SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.equipment.valve

Class InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.valve.InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer
public class InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer extends Object
Diagnoses inadvertent valve operation (IVO) scenarios on a ValveInterface per API 521 §4.4.13 and NORSOK P-002 §5.5.

The analyser takes a configured valve, a functional role and a failure mode, then evaluates the credible consequence (overpressure of the upstream / downstream segment, blocked outlet, loss of relief path, failure to isolate on demand, reverse flow). Initiating-event frequencies default to typical screening values from IOGP Report 434-9 / OREDA and can be overridden.

The class is deliberately conservative — it screens for credible IVO scenarios and produces recommendations (PSV, HIPPS, double block and bleed, key-locked open, mechanical interlock, position monitoring). It does not compute relief loads — feed the resulting frequency-tagged scenario into runRelief or LOPA for that.

Version:
1.0
Author:
esol

    Description
    static final double
    API521_FIRE_ACCUMULATION_FACTOR
    API 521 maximum accumulation for fire-case / multiple jeopardy.

    API 521 §5.4.2 maximum accumulation for non-fire single-jeopardy scenarios.

    setDesignPressure(double pressure, String unit)
    Set the design pressure (MAWP) of the segment that becomes exposed by the IVO.
    InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer
    setDownstreamDesignPressure(double pressure, String unit)
    Set the design pressure of the downstream segment (for SPURIOUS_OPEN scenarios where a high-pressure source is connected to a lower-pressure system).
    InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer
    setFrequencyPerYear(double frequency)
    Override the default initiating-event frequency.
    InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer

    Set the functional role of the valve.
    InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer

    Override the upstream source pressure (e.g. when the valve has not been simulated with the IVO upset condition).

  • Constructor Details

    • InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer

      public InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer(ValveInterface valve)
      Construct an analyser for the given valve.
      Parameters:
      valve - the valve to analyse; must have been run at least once

  • Method Details

    • setRole

      public InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer setRole(InadvertentValveOperationResult.ValveRole role)
      Set the functional role of the valve.
      Parameters:
      role - valve role
      Returns:
      this analyser (for chaining)

    • setMode

      public InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer setMode(InadvertentValveOperationResult.IvoMode mode)
      Set the inadvertent operation mode to evaluate.
      Parameters:
      mode - IVO mode
      Returns:
      this analyser (for chaining)

    • setDesignPressure

      public InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer setDesignPressure(double pressure, String unit)
      Set the design pressure (MAWP) of the segment that becomes exposed by the IVO.
      Parameters:
      pressure - design pressure value
      unit - unit (only "bara" is supported)
      Returns:
      this analyser (for chaining)

    • setDownstreamDesignPressure

      public InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer setDownstreamDesignPressure(double pressure, String unit)
      Set the design pressure of the downstream segment (for SPURIOUS_OPEN scenarios where a high-pressure source is connected to a lower-pressure system).
      Parameters:
      pressure - downstream design pressure value
      unit - unit (only "bara" is supported)
      Returns:
      this analyser (for chaining)

    • setFrequencyPerYear

      public InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer setFrequencyPerYear(double frequency)
      Override the default initiating-event frequency.
      Parameters:
      frequency - events per year
      Returns:
      this analyser (for chaining)

    • setUpstreamPressure

      public InadvertentValveOperationAnalyzer setUpstreamPressure(double pressure, String unit)
      Override the upstream source pressure (e.g. when the valve has not been simulated with the IVO upset condition).
      Parameters:
      pressure - upstream pressure value
      unit - unit (only "bara" is supported)
      Returns:
      this analyser (for chaining)

    • analyze

      public InadvertentValveOperationResult analyze()
      Run the IVO analysis.
      Returns:
      populated InadvertentValveOperationResult
